title: 香港係一個悲劇 Hong Kong is a tragedy

replies.msg:
Over the years, many developed foreign countries earn huge amount of money from Hong Kong. On the other hand, the citizens in Hong Kong donate billions of dollars to the developing countries through charity organizations years after years. We provided Asylum to Vietnamese during the war, the United Nation is still owing Hong Kong 1.16 billion HKD for that. Hong Kong people never asked for any return, we didn't even think about it, despite our life is getting more and more difficult.

Today, we are standing up for our freedom, tens of thousands of young people are blooding on the street, they are using umbrella, gas masks to flight with the world largest tyranny - Chinese Communist Party (CCP). Month after month, where is the international support? where are those countries who said themselves "support human right", "liberty", "democratic"? Only the United States and few alliances voiced out for Hong Kong. Where are those charity organizations? which Hong Kong people donated huge amount of money? The lack of international support makes Hong Kong people flight alone in this "war of impossible". If the foreign governments keep silent because of the benefit from China, one day, no one will stand up for you when tyranny comes to your countries.

If there is a god, who is fair, and perfect, please save the people in Hong Kong from this unfair, and lack of justice world.

多年以來，好多已發展國家係香港賺取巨大財富。另一方面，香港人通過各個慈善機構，多年來捐出數以十億計善款矛發展中國家。我地為越南人係戰亂時提供庇護，聯合國亦因此仍欠香港11億港元難民支出。我地從來無為此而問過任何回報，就算我地生活愈來愈困難，我地仲係無諗過回報。

今日，我地企起黎為我地既自由而戰，數以十萬計既年輕人浴血街頭，佢地只有傘同防毒面具去同世界上最大既暴政對抗 - 中國共產黨。一個又一個月過去，國際支援係邊度？果D自稱"支持人權"，"自由主義"，"民主"既國家？只有美國同少量盟友為香港而發聲。果堆香港人年年捐錢既慈善機構又去左邊？缺乏國際支援令香港人係依場"不可能既戰爭"孤立無援。當各國政府因為來自中國既利益而選擇保持沈默，終有一日，當暴政來到你地既國家，將唔會再有人為你企起來反抗。

如果世界真係有一位公正，至善既上帝，請你從依個不公平，不公義既世界中拯救香港人

replies.msg:
以前真係好憎香港呢個痴線地方，直到雨傘有少少改變呢個睇法，原來有咁多咁好嘅香港人，咁多善良嘅香港人，咁多愛香港嘅香港人，直到今年我真係好愛呢個地方。

我呢一世都唔會忘記今年夏天發生過嘅事。我真係好撚憎共產黨，好撚憎香港班仆街狗官，好撚憎差佬。

原來我好愛呢個香港，好愛呢到幫香港出力嘅真香港人，希望大家最後都可以一齊係煲底到見

大家，聽日見

If there is a god, who is fair, and perfect, please save the people in Hong Kong from this unfair, and lack of justice world.

Over the years, many developed foreign countries earn huge amount of money from Hong Kong. On the other hand, the citizens in Hong Kong donate billions of dollars to the developing countries through charity organizations years after years. We provided Asylum to Vietnamese during the war, the United Nation is still owing Hong Kong 1.16 billion HKD for that. Hong Kong people never asked for any return, we didn't even think about it, despite our life is getting more and more difficult.

Today, we are standing up for our freedom, tens of thousands of young people are blooding on the street, they are using umbrella, gas masks to flight with the world largest tyranny - Chinese Communist Party (CCP). Month after month, where is the international support? where are those countries who said themselves "support human right", "liberty", "democratic"? Only the United States and few alliances voiced out for Hong Kong. Where are those charity organizations? which Hong Kong people donated huge amount of money? The lack of international support makes Hong Kong people flight alone in this "war of impossible". If the foreign governments keep silent because of the benefit from China, one day, no one will stand up for you when tyranny comes to your countries.

If there is a god, who is fair, and perfect, please save the people in Hong Kong from this unfair, and lack of justice world.

多年以來，好多已發展國家係香港賺取巨大財富。另一方面，香港人通過各個慈善機構，多年來捐出數以十億計善款矛發展中國家。我地為越南人係戰亂時提供庇護，聯合國亦因此仍欠香港11億港元難民支出。我地從來無為此而問過任何回報，就算我地生活愈來愈困難，我地仲係無諗過回報。

今日，我地企起黎為我地既自由而戰，數以十萬計既年輕人浴血街頭，佢地只有傘同防毒面具去同世界上最大既暴政對抗 - 中國共產黨。一個又一個月過去，國際支援係邊度？果D自稱"支持人權"，"自由主義"，"民主"既國家？只有美國同少量盟友為香港而發聲。果堆香港人年年捐錢既慈善機構又去左邊？缺乏國際支援令香港人係依場"不可能既戰爭"孤立無援。當各國政府因為來自中國既利益而選擇保持沈默，終有一日，當暴政來到你地既國家，將唔會再有人為你企起來反抗。

如果世界真係有一位公正，至善既上帝，請你從依個不公平，不公義既世界中拯救香港人

Where are those countries that "support human rights," "liberty," "democratic"? Only the United States and few alliances voiced out for Hong Kong. Where are those charity organizations? Which Hong Kong people donated a considerable amount of money? The lack of international support makes Hong Kong people flight alone in this "war of impossible." If the foreign governments keep silent because of the benefit from China, one day, no one will stand up for you when tyranny comes to your countries.

If there is a god, who is fair, and perfect, please save the people in Hong Kong from this unfair, and lack of justice world.

In medicine|historical|lang=en terms the difference between bleeding and blooding is that bleeding is (medicine|historical) bloodletting while blooding is (medicine|historical) a bleeding.

As verbs the difference between bleeding and blooding is that bleeding is while blooding is .
As nouns the difference between bleeding and blooding is that bleeding is the flow or loss of blood from a damaged blood vessel while blooding is (medicine|historical) a bleeding.

As an adjective bleeding is (uk|slang) (used as an intensifier) extreme, outright.
As an adverb bleeding is (uk|slang) (used as an intensifier) extremely.

https://wikidiff.com/blooding/bleeding

quote.msg:
Over the years, many developed foreign countries earn huge amount of money from Hong Kong. On the other hand, the citizens in Hong Kong donate billions of dollars to the developing countries through charity organizations years after years. We provided Asylum to Vietnamese during the war, the United Nation is still owing Hong Kong 1.16 billion HKD for that. Hong Kong people never asked for any return, we didn't even think about it, despite our life is getting more and more difficult.

Today, we are standing up for our freedom, tens of thousands of young people are blooding on the street, they are using umbrella, gas masks to flight with the world largest tyranny - Chinese Communist Party (CCP). Month after month, where is the international support? where are those countries who said themselves "support human right", "liberty", "democratic"? Only the United States and few alliances voiced out for Hong Kong. Where are those charity organizations? which Hong Kong people donated huge amount of money? The lack of international support makes Hong Kong people flight alone in this "war of impossible". If the foreign governments keep silent because of the benefit from China, one day, no one will stand up for you when tyranny comes to your countries.

If there is a god, who is fair, and perfect, please save the people in Hong Kong from this unfair, and lack of justice world.

多年以來，好多已發展國家係香港賺取巨大財富。另一方面，香港人通過各個慈善機構，多年來捐出數以十億計善款矛發展中國家。我地為越南人係戰亂時提供庇護，聯合國亦因此仍欠香港11億港元難民支出。我地從來無為此而問過任何回報，就算我地生活愈來愈困難，我地仲係無諗過回報。

今日，我地企起黎為我地既自由而戰，數以十萬計既年輕人浴血街頭，佢地只有傘同防毒面具去同世界上最大既暴政對抗 - 中國共產黨。一個又一個月過去，國際支援係邊度？果D自稱"支持人權"，"自由主義"，"民主"既國家？只有美國同少量盟友為香港而發聲。果堆香港人年年捐錢既慈善機構又去左邊？缺乏國際支援令香港人係依場"不可能既戰爭"孤立無援。當各國政府因為來自中國既利益而選擇保持沈默，終有一日，當暴政來到你地既國家，將唔會再有人為你企起來反抗。

如果世界真係有一位公正，至善既上帝，請你從依個不公平，不公義既世界中拯救香港人
